name: 14"x20" Mod Tufted Outdoor Lumbar Pillow Cream - Threshold™
description:
Enhance your seating with the textural charm of this Mod Tufted Outdoor Lumbar Pillow from Threshold™. This rectangular canvas pillow showcases tufted bands on a white backdrop for an elevated look. Designed with a recycled polyester exterior and 100% polyester fiber filling, this outdoor lumbar pillow is perfect for adding comfort to any chair, sofa, bench or lounge chair on your porch, deck or patio.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
